text.title: stakeholder-communication Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for stakeholder-communication as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Accepting verbal agreement from a "Changing" stakeholder without a written confirmation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Verbal agreements are repudiated under project pressure. A written confirmation email creates a dated record that prevents requirement drift from becoming a dispute.
